title: Prenatal organochlorine and methylmercury exposure and memory and learning in school-age children in communities near the New Bedford Harbor Superfund site, Massachusetts.
summary: The study assesses the association between low-level prenatal exposure to PCBs, organochlorines, and methylmercury and memory and learning in school-age children living near the New Bedford Harbor Superfund Site.
population: school-age children in communities near the New Bedford Harbor Superfund Site, Massachusetts
